hypothesis: Incorporating explicit metal-centered oxidation-state and ligand-field/spin-state descriptors computed from local coordination geometry and donor atom identities into the Δ-learning XGBoost model will reduce the HSE06 band-gap prediction mean absolute error for MOFs containing Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, or Ni by at least 25% relative to the same model trained only on ST-135, RACs, and APRDF features.
